states.disclosureSummary: Contract of sale must be prepared before advertising. Pool, encumbrance, and certificate prompts are enforced where relevant.

coolingOff.label: NSW private treaty cooling-off
coolingOff.note: Support exchange and cooling-off expiry milestones. Sellers must confirm contract prepared before publishing.

publishingPrerequisites: Seller confirms lawful authority to market the property.
Contract of sale prepared by legal representative before the listing can go live.
Pool compliance and defect disclosures captured where relevant.

requiredDocuments.title: Contract of sale
requiredDocuments.description: Legal-prepared contract must exist before the property is advertised.

requiredDocuments.title: Pool compliance certificate
requiredDocuments.description: Required when a pool or spa is present and certification is applicable.

inspectionGuidance: Display open-home safety notes and access instructions.
Encourage buyers to review contract and certificates before offer escalation.
offerWarnings: Offers are non-binding until a valid NSW contract is exchanged.
Cooling-off rights may apply to private treaty buyers.

states.disclosureSummary: Section 32 must be supplied before a buyer signs. Conditional private sale offers are supported.

coolingOff.label: Victoria private sale cooling-off
coolingOff.note: Section 32 delivery should be tracked before progressing to contract.

publishingPrerequisites: Seller confirms lawful authority to market.
Section 32 vendor statement uploaded or marked in legal preparation.

requiredDocuments.title: Section 32 vendor statement
requiredDocuments.description: Required before any buyer signs a contract.

inspectionGuidance: Make finance and building/pest offer conditions visible.
Prompt buyers to obtain legal review before formal signing.
offerWarnings: Offers remain non-binding until a valid Victorian contract is signed.
Cooling-off rights differ by transaction context.

states.disclosureSummary: Seller disclosure statement and prescribed certificates must be given before the buyer signs. Delivery proof must be retained.

coolingOff.label: Queensland private treaty cooling-off
coolingOff.note: Disclosure delivery receipts should be preserved for the transaction record.

publishingPrerequisites: Disclosure statement checklist completed with encumbrance, zoning, contamination, heritage, and pool prompts.

requiredDocuments.title: Seller disclosure bundle
requiredDocuments.description: Bundle of prescribed disclosure statement and relevant certificates.

requiredDocuments.title: Body corporate records
requiredDocuments.description: Required when the property forms part of a body corporate or community titles scheme.

inspectionGuidance: Show delivery receipts for disclosure documents to buyers and compliance staff.
Warn that inaccurate disclosure can affect contract rights.
offerWarnings: Offers are non-binding until formal contract execution.
Queensland disclosure accuracy is important and may affect the buyer's rights.

states.disclosureSummary: Form 1 workflow, amendment notice support, service-date tracking, and cooling-off countdown support are required.

coolingOff.label: South Australia cooling-off
coolingOff.note: Countdown should commence from compliant service where applicable.

requiredDocuments.title: Form 1 vendor statement
requiredDocuments.description: Capture service date and amendment notice metadata.

inspectionGuidance: Track amendment notices and the date disclosure was served.
Allow compliance staff to request corrections before publish.
offerWarnings: Offers remain non-binding until a valid contract is formed.
Cooling-off timing depends on compliant service of Form 1.

states.disclosureSummary: Draft contract and seller-provided building and pest reports are supported before sale. Reimbursement metadata can be tracked.

coolingOff.label: ACT cooling-off
coolingOff.note: ACT reporting and contract package should be in place before marketing.

publishingPrerequisites: Draft contract is ready before offering the property for sale.
Building and compliance report workflow enabled.

requiredDocuments.title: Draft contract
requiredDocuments.description: Required before the listing can go live.

requiredDocuments.title: Building and compliance inspection report
requiredDocuments.description: Seller-provided building report for ACT workflow.

requiredDocuments.title: Pest inspection report
requiredDocuments.description: Seller-provided pest report with reimbursement metadata if applicable.

inspectionGuidance: Enable buyer reimbursement metadata on reports when used.
Prominently show seller-provided inspection report provenance.
offerWarnings: Offers are non-binding until contract execution.
ACT-specific contract and report package should be reviewed with legal advice.

states.disclosureSummary: Approved contract-form placeholder and non-auction cooling-off support are included.

coolingOff.label: Northern Territory cooling-off
coolingOff.note: Support private treaty progression from offer into contract request.

publishingPrerequisites: Seller confirms lawful authority to list.

requiredDocuments.title: Approved form contract placeholder
requiredDocuments.description: Prepare to route to approved NT form before legal progression.

inspectionGuidance: Prompt buyers to seek legal advice prior to formalising.
offerWarnings: Offers remain non-binding until the approved NT contract is executed.

states.disclosureSummary: No statutory cooling-off by default. Finance, building, and sale-of-home conditions must be obvious.

coolingOff.label: No statutory cooling-off by default
coolingOff.note: Offer builder should encourage clear conditional clauses and buyer legal review.

requiredDocuments.title: Contract request pack
requiredDocuments.description: Recommended before moving from accepted in principle to legal review.

inspectionGuidance: Surface finance, building, pest, and sale-of-home clauses prominently.
offerWarnings: Offers are non-binding unless and until a valid contract is executed.
There is no general statutory cooling-off period by default in WA.

states.disclosureSummary: Buyer-beware prompts are prominent. The platform should not imply disclosure duties beyond applicable law.

coolingOff.label: No statutory cooling-off by default
coolingOff.note: Encourage buyer due diligence and professional advice.

publishingPrerequisites: Seller confirms lawful authority to market.
Buyer-beware and due diligence messaging enabled.

requiredDocuments.title: Contract request pack
requiredDocuments.description: Recommended for progression into legal review.

inspectionGuidance: Display due diligence prompts for title, planning, strata, and building condition.
offerWarnings: Offers remain non-binding until formal contract execution.
Cooling-off is not generally available by default.
